name: apex-shell
description: Apex Shell — the standalone window for AI seats, terminals, viewers, and trackers.

scripts.test: npm run test:core && npm run test:studio && npm run test:persona
scripts.test:live: node test/engine-harness.js && node test/codex-drill.js && node test/pty-drill.js
scripts.test:core: node test/launch-args-drill.js && node test/taskboard-drill.js && node test/audit-drill.js && node test/skills-drill.js && node test/linkify-drill.js
scripts.test:studio: node test/studio-drill.js && node test/studio-lib-drill.js && node test/studio-drafts-drill.js && node test/studio-review-drill.js && node test/studio-model-picker-drill.js && node test/studio-suggest-drill.js && node test/studio-codesigner-drill.js
scripts.test:persona: node test/persona-contract.js && node test/persona-extension.js && node test/persona-manage-drill.js && node test/persona-import-drill.js && node test/persona-relationships-drill.js
